signal:underspecified-payload-rung-3.notes: Meta-pattern: tracks how often the rung-3 payload format itself underspecifies the question. Distinct from a routing pattern — this is a skill-self-improvement signal.

signal:auto-loop-skip-rung-2-plus.notes: If this signal recurs across 3+ /loop /triage iterations with the same rung-1 famine, /loop /triage becomes low-yield and the user should switch to manual /triage with --bead= overrides.
